{
  "claims": [
    "California is experiencing the highest vacancy rates in office buildings in 30 years.",
    "There is a generational shift in work culture affecting office occupancy in California.",
    "Cities in California are facing unprecedented levels of blight due to plunging commercial real estate values and failing commercial leases.",

    "AB 3068 aims to facilitate the construction of thousands of new housing units by repurposing vacant office buildings.",

    "Many urban centers in California lack available housing despite the demand.",
    "AB 3068 features a labor agreement between the Building Trades and Carpenters Union for office-to-housing conversion projects.",

  ]
